debug_info.goal:
k : ℕ
⊢ Presheaf.IsSheaf CartSp.openCoverTopology
    { obj := fun n => DSmoothMap (Eucl (Opposite.unop n)) (Eucl (Opposite.unop n) [⋀^Fin k]→ₗ[ℝ] ℝ),
      map := fun {n m} f ω => { toFun := fun x => (ω (f.unop x)).compLinearMap ↑(fderiv ℝ (⇑f.unop) x), dsmooth := ⋯ },
      map_id := ⋯, map_comp := ⋯ }

failed_attempts:
rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    refine fun {n} s hs f hf ↦ ?_
    -- We construct the glued section by picking a representative from the cover for each point
    -- and pushing the value forward. Since the cover consists of local diffeomorphisms,
    -- the derivative is invertible.
    refine ⟨⟨fun x ↦ ?_, sorry⟩, sorry, sorry⟩
    · -- Define the value at x
      let hx := hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let i := (Set.mem_iUnion.1 hx).choose
      let spec := (Set.mem_iUnion.1 hx).choose_spec
      let g := (Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 spec).choose
      let g_spec := (Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 spec).choose_spec
      let y := g_spec.2.choose
      have hg : s g := g_spec.1
      -- Push forward the value (f g hg) at y to x using the inverse of the derivative
      exact (f g hg).1 y ∘ₗ (fderiv ℝ g.unop y).toLinearMap.IsUnit.unit.inv
